tool.name: ChatGPT
tool.shortDescription: General-purpose AI assistant for writing, coding, research, and problem-solving
tool.description: ChatGPT is OpenAI's flagship AI assistant, capable of handling writing, coding, document analysis, research, and multimodal tasks including image and video generation via Sora 2. It supports file uploads (PDFs, spreadsheets, images) and provides structured responses for a wide range of personal and professional tasks.
pros: Strong document analysis and data extraction
Large ecosystem of plugins and GPTs
tool.bestFor: General-purpose AI work, document analysis, coding assistance, research, and narrative video creation

relatedTools.name: Claude
relatedTools.shortDescription: AI assistant specialized in coding, technical writing, and structured reasoning
relatedTools.description: Claude by Anthropic is highly regarded for coding and structured problem-solving. It produces clean, well-documented code with fewer logic errors than many alternatives. Claude Code helps with real projects and larger codebases, while Claude Cowork automates multi-step desktop tasks without requiring scripting knowledge.
cons: Higher pricing for advanced plans ($100/mo for Max)
Focused more on technical tasks than creative writing
relatedTools.bestFor: Software development, debugging, refactoring, technical writing, research, and automating desktop tasks

relatedTools.name: Gemini
relatedTools.shortDescription: Google's AI assistant with deep research, audio summaries, and image editing
relatedTools.description: Gemini is Google's top-performing AI assistant, built for research, writing, analysis, and multimodal work. It handles extremely large documents, offers audio overview summaries (podcast-style recaps), and includes Deep Research for structured, web-informed analysis. Nano Banana provides advanced image editing capabilities.
features: Extremely large context window (2M tokens on Pro)
Nano Banana image editing (background swaps, object additions, scene transformations)
Strong at summarizing long research papers
pros: Handles massive documents without losing context
Audio summaries make complex material easier to absorb
Nano Banana image editing is fast and flexible
cons: Advanced features require Pro or Ultra plans
Still requires fact-checking for critical work
Audio summaries limited on free tier
relatedTools.bestFor: Research, analyzing long documents, studying, drafting reports, in-depth web research, and image editing

relatedTools.name: Grok
relatedTools.shortDescription: X's AI assistant focused on real-time topics, fact-checking, and uncensored generation
relatedTools.description: Grok is X's AI assistant, tightly integrated into the platform. It's widely used for fact-checking posts, participating in debates, and generating memes and uncensored images. Features like 'Think' and 'Deep Search' improve response quality. Grok Imagine extends into fast AI video generation for rapid visual ideas.
pros: Fast and capable for real-time topics
Good for trending topics and debates
cons: Requires X Premium or Premium+ subscription
Constant AI tagging on X can disrupt conversation flow
relatedTools.bestFor: Real-time fact-checking, debate, meme creation, uncensored image/video generation, and rapid visual experiments
